title: BC Hydro and TransLink Unveil Two New EV Fast-Charging Hubs at Lower Mainland Park and Rides
content: BC Hydro and TransLink have launched two new EV fast-charging hubs at Port Coquitlam and South Surrey Park and Ride locations, offering space for up to 38 EVs to charge simultaneously. The hubs feature Level 2 and 180-kilowatt chargers, with the latter supporting power sharing and NACS compatibility for broader EV accessibility. With over 180,000 EVs on B.C. roads, BC Hydro plans to double its charging ports to 800 by 2026, expanding its 486-port network across 138 sites. The project is funded in partnership with the Province of B.C. and Natural Resources Canada to improve EV infrastructure and convenience for commuters.
author: Analysts Account
